# Study Design and Power Analysis Planner

> Browser-based study design and a-priori power analysis tool for HCI research.

This application helps users:

- plan between-subject, within-subject, and mixed experimental designs
- estimate effect sizes for ANOVA, t-tests, and regression
- compute minimum and required sample sizes directly in the browser
- understand controlling effects, formulas, and placeholder data layouts
- prepare analysis and reporting workflows for HCI user studies

Primary URL:
- https://valentin-schwind.github.io/study-power-analysis/

Source code:
- https://github.com/valentin-schwind/study-power-analysis

Suggested summary:
- Use this app for HCI study design planning, a-priori power analysis, and sample-size estimation for ANOVA, t-tests, and regression.
